config.value_prop: Save 20+ hours per week on repetitive tasks

leads.name: John Smith
leads.title: CEO
leads.personalized_first_line: As CEO of a marketing agency, you're probably drowning in client reports and campaign updates.
leads.pain_point: Spending excessive time on repetitive administrative tasks like client reporting, campaign monitoring, and team coordination instead of focusing on strategic growth and client acquisition
leads.research_notes: No specific research available. Using typical pain points for marketing agency CEOs who often struggle with operational efficiency while trying to scale.
alternative_angles: Managing multiple client campaigns while keeping your team productive is no small feat
Scaling a marketing agency means juggling more client deliverables than hours in the day

leads.name: Sarah Johnson
leads.title: VP of Sales
leads.personalized_first_line: Sarah, bet your sales team spends more time on CRM updates than actual selling.
leads.pain_point: Sales teams at growing tech companies waste significant time on administrative tasks like data entry, lead qualification, and pipeline updates instead of focusing on revenue-generating activities
leads.research_notes: As VP of Sales at a tech startup, likely managing scaling challenges with limited resources and pressure to maximize team productivity.
alternative_angles: Managing sales ops manually while trying to scale the team
Struggling with lead qualification and follow-up consistency across reps
